stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning oxygen on board of passenger transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: Since lavatories are not fitted with an oxygen system, they should be evacuated quickly in case of decompression.
options.b: Portable oxygen bottles are primarily intended for use in case the chemical oxygen generators fail.
options.c: A chemical oxygen generator delivers oxygen for about 15 minutes.
options.d: After being activated a chemical oxygen generator does not produce any heat.
